title: Kbd
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Kbd and KbdGroup helpers using cn.

registry.reason: shadcn Kbd uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper.
Provides Effect Schema options for the helpers.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Only Kbd examples compose the existing local shadcn Button; the core Kbd helper does not require it.
Tooltip examples are represented by fixture-local static ButtonGroup shell classes until shadcn/button-group is implemented.
Input Group examples are represented by fixture-local static InputGroup shell classes until shadcn/input-group is implemented.
Tooltip examples are represented by fixture-local static Tooltip shell classes until shadcn/tooltip is implemented.
Origin icon examples are represented by local inline SVGs in this batch.
Origin language selector runtime dependency is replaced by local RTL example constants and origin fixture aliases.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: KbdButton
examples.description: Outline Button with inline end Kbd.

examples.title: KbdDemo
examples.description: Grouped modifier and shortcut Kbd examples.

examples.title: KbdGroup
KbdInputGroup
examples.description: Static Input Group shell with search icon and Kbd shortcut.

examples.title: KbdRtl
examples.description: RTL grouped Kbd layout example with local direction constants.

examples.title: KbdTooltip
examples.description: Static Tooltip shell examples with inline Kbd shortcuts.

deviations.summary: Icon examples use local inline SVGs instead of origin icon packages.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve the icon DOM role and visual footprint for Kbd examples without adding icon registry items.

deviations.summary: Input Group example uses fixture-local static Input Group shell classes instead of an installable shadcn Input Group component.
deviations.rationale: This batch intentionally does not add shadcn/input-group as an installable registry item. The static shell preserves the origin DOM slots and base-nova classes needed for the Kbd example snapshot.

deviations.summary: Tooltip example uses fixture-local static ButtonGroup and Tooltip shell classes instead of installable sibling components.
deviations.rationale: This batch intentionally does not add shadcn/button-group or shadcn/tooltip as installable registry items. Static shells preserve the origin DOM slots and visual classes without adding tooltip behavior.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local RTL constants preserve the default rendered direction while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
